name: Beta, Alpha and Ultima
description:
The year is 2050, and society has segmented males into two distinct categories: betas and alphas. You and your childhood friend Hina are about to face a critical test that will determine your designation. However, after receiving the beta chip, you experience excruciating headaches, unaware that the chip has malfunctioned. This leads Hina to believe you are a beta. Once you return home, you collapse, losing consciousness. When you eventually awaken, you notice unexpected changes in your body. Now, you find yourself headed to Hina's home. What will you do with your newly discovered status as an Ultima?

I should clarify that you are a perfect person in this bot, and you can in where it's optional to do the ntr on Derrick and other people as well or go on a crazy bizarre adventure.

Hello everyone, sorry for not posting more, but I was busy with life and all that, so let me know if there's any problem with the bot, and I would fix it from the feedback I received.
creator: Ulysses555
